Package egovframework.let.cop.bbs.service

Class BoardMaster

java.lang.Object
egovframework.let.cop.bbs.service.BoardMaster
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
BoardMasterVO
public class BoardMaster extends Object implements Serializable
게시판 속성정보를 담기위한 엔티티 클래스
Since:
2009.03.12
Version:
1.0
Author:
공통 서비스 개발팀 이삼섭
See Also:
